siteMeta._comment: START HERE — Change email, location, name, and role here. These auto-update the navbar, footer, contact page, and homepage.

doctorProfile._comment: SAFE TO EDIT — Doctor bio, clinic, specialties, and languages. Email/location here also override siteMeta if set.
doctorProfile.headline: Board Certified Dentist

externalLinks._comment: SAFE TO EDIT — External URLs only. Leave as empty string "" to hide. reviewForm is the Google Form link shown on the reviews page.

home._comment: SAFE TO EDIT — Homepage sections in order: hero -> areasOfPractice -> testimonials -> cta.

hero._comment: Hero section: headline, description, buttons, stats, and the profile card visual.
hero.description: A portfolio of clinical care with 3.5+ years of experience in preventive and restorative dentistry, oral surgery, and oral cancer screening.

areasOfPractice._comment: Section heading for the service cards preview on the homepage.
areasOfPractice.title: Areas of Practice
areasOfPractice.subtitle: A portfolio of preventive, restorative, and surgical dental care with an emphasis on patient education and outcomes.

testimonials._comment: Carousel section heading and behavior. autoplayMs controls how fast reviews rotate (in milliseconds).
testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from patients who have received care from Dr. Ankita Sharma.

cta.title: Let's Connect
cta.description: For patient inquiries, professional collaboration, or community outreach, feel free to reach out or share your experience.

secondaryButton._comment: AUTO-SYNCED — href and label auto-fill from siteMeta.email. Only set these to override with a different value.
secondaryButton.label: Email ankita.omfp@outlook.com

aboutPage._comment: SAFE TO EDIT — All text blocks on the /about portfolio page.
aboutPage.heroDescription: Board Certified Dentist focused on preventive, restorative, and surgical care with a patient-centered approach.

summarySection._comment: Professional summary card. Edit the summary paragraph text here.
summarySection.title: Professional Overview
summarySection.summary: A Board Certified Dentist with over 3.5 years of experience providing a full array of preventive and restorative dental services, patient care, and dental surgeries. Proven track record of improving patient satisfaction by providing superior dental care to a diverse patient base. Experienced in procedures associated with oral cancer screening and identifying early stages of oral cancer, oral benign, and pre-malignant lesions. Strong interpersonal and time management skills.

education.degree: Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD), Advanced Standing
education.school: Henry M. Goldman School of Dental Sciences

experienceSection._comment: Clinical role cards. Add an object to roles for each position. bullets is a list of responsibilities.
experienceSection.title: Clinical Roles
experienceSection.emptyBulletsFallback: General dentistry role supporting comprehensive patient care.

bullets: Performed routine dental procedures including extractions (simple and partially impacted), simple and complex restorations, full coverage restorations, partial and complete dentures, emergency care, endodontic treatment of anterior teeth, premolars, and first mandibular molars with ideal anatomy, and outpatient oral surgery procedures (e.g. incisional biopsy, alveoloplasty).
Diagnosis and treatment planning for oral benign, pre-malignant, and malignant lesions.
Conducted patient assessments and developed tailored treatment plans.
Collaborated with dental specialists to ensure comprehensive patient care.
Trained and supervised dental assistants in daily clinical operations.
Communicated treatment options and procedures clearly to patients.
Managed appointment scheduling and patient follow-ups to enhance clinic efficiency.
Engaged in community outreach programs to promote oral health awareness.

publicationsSection._comment: Publications list. Order is preserved in the UI — first item appears first.
publicationsSection.title: Publications
publications: Understanding patterns of invasion: a novel approach to assessment of podoplanin expression in prediction of lymph node metastasis in OSCC, Sharma A, Boaz K, N. Srikant, Histopathology, 72, 4, 672-678, 2018

Dysgenetic Polycystic Disease of Minor Salivary Gland: A Rare Case Report and Review of the Literature, N. Srikant, Shweta Yellapurkar, Karen Boaz, Mohan Baliga, Nidhi Manaktala, Ankita Sharma, Shakthi Dorai, Prajwal Pai, Case Reports in Pathology, 2017, 5279025, 5, 2017
Rapidly Enlarging Swelling of the Palate: A Case Report, K. Boaz, A. Sharma, N. Srikant, Journal of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Medicine and Pathology, Japanese Editorial, 29, 6, 576-580, 2017
Vitality and accuracy of age estimation using tooth coronal index, cementum and sclerosis index, Reddy BM, Natarajan S, Sharma A, Dorai SB, JCDUR, 7, 2, 3-7, 2016
Rhinocerebral mucormycosis: a systematic review of case reports and case series from a global perspective, Kumar M et al., Oral Surg Oral Med Oral Pathol Oral Radiol, 134, 6, 708-716, 2022

reviewsPage._comment: SAFE TO EDIT — Labels and headings on the /reviews page. Actual patient reviews are in the 'reviews' array below.
reviewsPage.title: Patient Reviews

shareExperience.title: Share Your Experience
shareExperience.description: Your feedback helps us provide better care. We'd love to hear about your experience with Dr. Ankita Sharma.

contactPage._comment: SAFE TO EDIT — Contact page header text. The info cards below are AUTO-SYNCED from siteMeta and doctorProfile — change the master values there.
contactPage.title: Contact Ankita
contactPage.subtitle: Patient inquiries, referrals, and professional collaborations welcome.

contactInfo._autoSync: content and href auto-filled from siteMeta.email
contactInfo.title: Email

reviewsPlaceholder._comment: TEMPLATE — Copy this object into the reviews array above when adding a real patient review. Fill in all fields. Delete this _comment key from your copy.
reviewsPlaceholder.name: Patient Name
reviewsPlaceholder.review: Write the patient review text here.

services._comment: SAFE TO EDIT — Each object is one service card. iconKey must be from __schema.iconKeyExamples.
services.title: Preventive & Restorative Care
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive exams, cleanings, and restorations with a prevention-first focus.
services.fullDescription: Experienced in simple and complex restorations as well as full coverage restorations, with treatment plans tailored to each patient.
services.whoIsItFor: Patients seeking routine care, restorations, or long-term oral health planning.

services.title: Extractions & Emergency Care
services.shortDescription: Same-day relief with gentle extractions and urgent dental care.
services.fullDescription: Performed routine extractions including simple and partially impacted cases, plus emergency visits to stabilize pain and infection.
services.whoIsItFor: Patients with urgent dental issues or teeth that require removal.

services.title: Endodontic Therapy
services.shortDescription: Root canal care for anterior teeth, premolars, and first mandibular molars.
services.fullDescription: Experienced in endodontic treatment of anterior teeth, premolars, and first mandibular molars with ideal anatomy.
services.whoIsItFor: Patients with pulp infection or inflammation requiring root canal therapy.

services.title: Dentures & Prosthodontics
services.shortDescription: Partial and complete dentures designed for comfort and function.
services.fullDescription: Skilled in delivering partial and complete dentures with attention to fit, esthetics, and function.
services.whoIsItFor: Patients needing replacement of multiple or all teeth.

services.title: Oral Surgery & Biopsy
services.shortDescription: Outpatient oral surgery including incisional biopsy and alveoloplasty.
services.fullDescription: Performed outpatient oral surgery procedures such as incisional biopsy and alveoloplasty with precise surgical technique.
services.whoIsItFor: Patients requiring surgical evaluation or minor oral surgery.

services.title: Oral Cancer Screening
services.shortDescription: Early identification of benign, pre-malignant, and malignant lesions.
services.fullDescription: Experienced in oral cancer screening and identifying early stages of oral cancer, as well as benign and pre-malignant lesions.
services.whoIsItFor: All patients, especially those seeking comprehensive preventive evaluations.

services.title: Invisalign Certified Care
services.shortDescription: Clear aligner therapy delivered by a certified provider.
services.fullDescription: Invisalign Certification supports evidence-based clear aligner planning and patient guidance.
services.whoIsItFor: Patients interested in clear aligner orthodontic care.

services.title: Facial Injectables & Botox
services.shortDescription: Certified in facial injectables and Botox for facial esthetics.
services.fullDescription: Facial injectables and Botox certification reflects training in facial esthetics and patient care.

layout._comment: TECHNICAL — Navbar links and footer. Footer 'details' are AUTO-SYNCED from siteMeta and doctorProfile — edit master values there instead.

navbar._comment: Top navigation links and button labels. desktopEmailText is AUTO-SYNCED from siteMeta.email — leave blank.

footer._comment: Footer summary text, CTA buttons, and professional detail rows.
footer.summary: Board Certified Dentist with 3.5+ years of experience in preventive and restorative dentistry, oral surgery, and oral cancer screening.

details._autoSync: AUTO-SYNCED from siteMeta.location — edit there instead
AUTO-SYNCED from siteMeta.primaryRole + doctorProfile.clinicName — edit there instead
AUTO-SYNCED from doctorProfile.languages — edit there instead
AUTO-SYNCED from siteMeta.email — edit there instead

footer.copyrightTemplate: (c) {{year}} Dr. Ankita Sharma. All rights reserved.

seo._comment: TECHNICAL — Browser tab title, meta description, and Open Graph image for social sharing previews.
seo.defaultDescription: Portfolio of preventive, restorative, and surgical dental care by Dr. Ankita Sharma.

visibility._comment: TECHNICAL — Show/hide site sections. true = visible, false = hidden.

display._comment: TECHNICAL — Controls how many items appear on the homepage (services count, testimonial count, minimum star rating for featured reviews).

assets._comment: TECHNICAL — Image registry. Do not rename any keys — they are referenced by services and the hero section.

images._comment: Use either `path` (public URL/path) or bundled fallback via `importKey`. If `path` is blank, the bundled import is used.

layoutConfig._comment: TECHNICAL — Tailwind CSS class strings. Do not edit unless you understand Tailwind CSS. These control the visual layout of service cards and the reviews grid.

homeServices.cardClassName: group glass-card rounded-2xl p-6 hover-lift h-full text-center flex flex-col items-center
homeServices.iconContainerClassName: w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center mb-4 transition-all duration-300 group-hover:scale-110

adminPage._comment: RARELY USED — Admin login/dashboard labels. Only relevant if visibility.showAdminPage is set to true.

notFoundPage._comment: RARELY CHANGED — Text shown on the 404 page.
notFoundPage.title: Oops! Page not found

__schema._comment: REFERENCE ONLY — Valid values for iconKey fields used in services, footer details, and contact info. Do not edit this block.

__guide._comment: Quick-start editing guide. For the full visual guide see Website-Content-Editing-Guide.docx.
howToEdit: 1. Change email or location? Update siteMeta.email and siteMeta.location — these auto-update the entire site.
2. Update page text? Find the page key (home, aboutPage, reviewsPage, contactPage) and edit text values.
3. Add a patient review? Copy the reviewsPlaceholder object into the reviews array. Fill in all fields.
4. Add a service card? Copy any object from services. Give it a unique id. Use a valid iconKey from __schema.
5. Commit and push to GitHub — the site deploys automatically.
doNotEdit: layoutConfig — Tailwind CSS class strings. Wrong values will break the layout.
assets.images keys — renaming any key breaks references from services and the hero section.
__schema — reference only, not rendered on the site.
